tasks.title: Pin openai@^4 in package.json
tasks.task: Update package.json dependencies: openai ^3.2.1 → ^4. Run npm install to update package-lock.json. Verify ESM import works.
acceptance: package.json dependencies.openai is ^4 (not ^3)
npm install succeeds without peer dependency conflicts
node -e "import('openai').then(m => console.log(typeof m.OpenAI))" prints 'function'

tasks.title: Constructor + createForTest + v4 error mapping
tasks.task: Rewrite OpenAiService constructor: replace v3 Configuration/OpenAIApi with v4 OpenAI({ apiKey, maxRetries: 0 }). Add static createForTest(deps) factory. Map v4 OpenAI.APIError.status to OpenAiException.code for 429/401/400.
acceptance: Constructor uses new OpenAI({ apiKey, maxRetries: 0 }) from 'openai' (v4 ESM)
deps.client ?? new OpenAI(...) allows injectable mock client (DEC-0009)
static createForTest(deps) returns new OpenAiService(deps)
OpenAiException.code === error.status for APIError instances (429, 401, 400)
Non-APIError throws map to OpenAiException(null, null, 'Network error: ...')
No .data accessor on client calls (v4 returns directly)

tasks.title: #buildCategorySchema + classify() Structured Outputs
tasks.task: Add private #buildCategorySchema(categories) building json_schema with runtime enum [...categories, 'UNKNOWN']. Rewrite classify() to use chat.completions.create with response_format json_schema strict:true. Map UNKNOWN→null, refusal→null. Remove post-hoc indexOf validation.
acceptance: #buildCategorySchema returns { type: 'object', properties: { category: { type: 'string', enum: [...categories.filter(Boolean), 'UNKNOWN'] } }, required: ['category'], additionalProperties: false }
classify() sends response_format: { type: 'json_schema', json_schema: { name: 'transaction_category', strict: true, schema: ... } }
parsed.category === 'UNKNOWN' returns { category: null, response: 'UNKNOWN', prompt }
Valid enum returns { category: guess, response: guess, prompt }
message.refusal set returns { category: null, response: refusal, prompt }
JSON parse failure returns { category: null, response: rawContent, prompt } + console.warn
Post-hoc categories.indexOf(guess) removed (schema enforcement replaces it)
External contract { category, prompt, response } preserved

tasks.title: matchAccount + extractTransactionsFromText v4 call path
tasks.task: Update matchAccount() and extractTransactionsFromText() to use v4 chat.completions.create API (drop .data accessor). No schema — legacy prompt+parse preserved per DEC-0010.
acceptance: matchAccount() uses this.#openAi.chat.completions.create(...) without .data
extractTransactionsFromText() uses this.#openAi.chat.completions.create(...) without .data
Response parsing logic unchanged (legacy prompt+parse preserved)
No Structured Outputs schema added to sibling methods (DEC-0010 scope_out)

tasks.title: tests/openAiService.test.js (oai-1–oai-5)
tasks.task: Create tests/openAiService.test.js with injectable mock client per DEC-0009. Cover: oai-1-schema-enum, oai-2-valid-category, oai-3-unknown-null, oai-4-refusal, oai-5-429-exception.
acceptance: oai-1-schema-enum: captured response_format.json_schema.schema.properties.category.enum === [...categories, 'UNKNOWN']; strict: true
oai-2-valid-category: returns { category: 'Groceries', response: 'Groceries', prompt }
oai-3-unknown-null: enum UNKNOWN returns { category: null, response: 'UNKNOWN', prompt }
oai-4-refusal: message.refusal returns { category: null, response: refusal, prompt }
oai-5-429-exception: mock reject with APIError(429) throws with .code === 429
Uses OpenAiService.createForTest({ client: { chat: { completions: { create: mock } } } })
No OPENAI_API_KEY required (pure mock client)
Picked up by node --test tests/ (no runner change)

tasks.title: Full bash tests/run-tests.sh green
tasks.task: Run full test suite: bash tests/run-tests.sh. Verify exit 0 with all precedence tests (4/4) + new openAiService tests (oai-1–oai-5) passing. Fix any regressions.
acceptance: bash tests/run-tests.sh exits 0
tests/resolveCategory.test.js 4/4 cases pass (no regression from SDK migration)
tests/openAiService.test.js 5 cases pass (oai-1–oai-5)
No OPENAI_API_KEY required in test environment
AC-3 regression gate satisfied
